content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Counting Bits". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/counting-bits/
constraints: The input is a single integer n.
content.inputFormat: The function takes an integer n as input.
content.outputFormat: The function returns a list of integers where the i-th integer represents the number of bits that are set to 1 in the binary representation of i.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Iterate over all numbers from 0 to n and count the number of bits set to 1 in the binary representation of each number.
